blocks.text: You are a senior code reviewer. Review the ZCrystal Plugin codebase at /home/snow/.openclaw/workspace/zcrystal-plugin focusing on: 1) Architectural issues and redundant modules 2) Code quality problems 3) Potential bugs or security issues 4) Performance concerns 5) Suggestions for cleanup. Examine src/index.ts, src/honcho-client.ts, src/tools/, src/self-evolution.ts, src/skill-manager.ts. Provide a concise report with critical issues, improvements needed, what's working well, and priority order for fixes. Output as JSON with keys: critical_issues[], improvements[], working_well[], priority_fixes[].
